how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_038_completed: TESTFORGE REMOVAL CONFIRMED — 'remove module' picker ran end to end. testforge_module removed: triggers cleared, folder deleted, list empty. ModuleForge pipeline fully verified.
MNEMIS NAMED AND BUILT — Slot 6 filled. Mnemis, The Rememberer. Sovereign living memory for Ethica. Indexes session digests, build logs, and files dropped into memory/vault/.
MEMORY VAULT CREATED — ~/Ethica/memory/vault/ created. Accepts .txt .md .json .pdf. Drop a file, Mnemis indexes it immediately. No restart needed.

MNEMIS MODULE BUILT — ~/Ethica/modules/mnemis/ with manifest.json and mnemis_module.py (431 lines). Four tools: mnemis_status, mnemis_index, mnemis_search, mnemis_recall. Keyword extraction, summary extraction, scored search across vault files + build log + session summaries.

VAULT WATCHER LIVE — Threading loop polls memory/vault/ every 3s. On file drop: extracts text (PDF via pdfminer/pypdf, md/txt/json direct), extracts keywords, writes summary, updates mnemis_index.json, notifies Tinity via chat bubble.
TRIGGERS WIRED — chat_engine.py MODULE_TRIGGERS and _triggers both patched: mnemis status, mnemis index, mnemis search, mnemis recall.
BOOT HOOK WIRED — main_window.py _start_mnemis() added. Fires at root.after(1500). Finds Mnemis impl via module registry, calls init(notify_fn) to start watcher and run initial index.
GUARD SCOPE EXTENDED — mnemis added to MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. Vault sealed: 2 Mnemis files protected (manifest.json, mnemis_module.py).
TINITY CONFIRMED WORKING — First search fired live in session. Watcher notification appeared in chat. Tinity reported: 'indexed, searchable memory so nothing gets lost.'

pdf_extraction_dependency.symptom: PDF indexing requires pdfminer.six or pypdf. If neither installed, PDF returns extraction error string but does not crash.
pdf_extraction_dependency.fix: pip install pdfminer.six in Ethica_env if PDF support needed.
pdf_extraction_dependency.priority: low — txt/md/json work without any extra deps
